description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline and graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colors Do not belach Tumble dry on low Do not iron on print Get ready to feel like a Kryptonian yourself with this white superman tee from  bioworld. The graphic on the front depicts superman in a classic stance - withstanding enormous pressure with his will - and induces this tee with his power. Pair this t-shirt with sneakers and light denims for that stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
